basis: Pure door deals at this venue lose money 93% of the time (avg net to venue −$1,007). Replace with a hybrid: artist gets a $500 floor regardless of walk-up, then 60% of the pool above an $800 expense cap. Projected artist payout ~$2,407 at the cell-average gross of $4,420; venue stops eating expense overruns on slow nights. Confidence tier B (first-time).

Across 136 past vs deals in the $1–5K bucket, the artist was paid $4,928 on average (P10 $1,962 – P90 $8,507). A flat at $4,950 matches the historical expected payout, removing the post-show recoup arithmetic that drives most disputes. Confidence tier B (first-time).
